item.title: John Deere: What’s Going On Here?
item.description: A surprising moment with a John Deere tractor or equipment. See what happened and why it caught the operator off guard on the farm.

media:content.media:title: John Deere: What’s Going On Here?
media:content.media:description: A surprising moment with a John Deere tractor or equipment. See what happened and why it caught the operator off guard on the farm.

item.title: Rare Moment Captured on the Farm
item.description: Witness an unusual event on the farm that doesn’t happen often. A surprising and memorable moment in everyday farm life.

media:content.media:title: Rare Moment Captured on the Farm
media:content.media:description: Witness an unusual event on the farm that doesn’t happen often. A surprising and memorable moment in everyday farm life.

item.title: World’s Largest Grain Cart Gets Stuck
item.description: Watch as the world’s biggest grain cart struggles and gets stuck. See the challenges and efforts involved in freeing this massive piece of farm equipment.

media:content.media:title: World’s Largest Grain Cart Gets Stuck
media:content.media:description: Watch as the world’s biggest grain cart struggles and gets stuck. See the challenges and efforts involved in freeing this massive piece of farm equipment.

item.title: Trying Not to Break This
item.description: A careful and tense moment as someone handles fragile or important equipment. Watch the effort to avoid damage while completing the task.

media:content.media:title: Trying Not to Break This
media:content.media:description: A careful and tense moment as someone handles fragile or important equipment. Watch the effort to avoid damage while completing the task.

item.title: Finally Sold It!
item.description: Celebrate the successful sale of equipment or a vehicle. Watch the final steps and the excitement of closing the deal.

media:content.media:title: Finally Sold It!
media:content.media:description: Celebrate the successful sale of equipment or a vehicle. Watch the final steps and the excitement of closing the deal.

item.title: Dropping Off Grain at the Farm
item.description: Watch the process of transporting and unloading grain. A practical look at farm operations and handling harvest deliveries efficiently.

media:content.media:title: Dropping Off Grain at the Farm
media:content.media:description: Watch the process of transporting and unloading grain. A practical look at farm operations and handling harvest deliveries efficiently.

item.title: Farming in Minnesota Is Fun!
item.description: A look at the joys of farming in Minnesota. From planting to harvest, see the daily work, scenery, and satisfaction that comes with life on the farm.

media:content.media:title: Farming in Minnesota Is Fun!
media:content.media:description: A look at the joys of farming in Minnesota. From planting to harvest, see the daily work, scenery, and satisfaction that comes with life on the farm.

item.title: Trading Planters Is Almost as Bad as Combines
item.description: The challenges of trading planters can rival handling combines. See the process, frustrations, and lessons learned in swapping out this essential farm equipment.

media:content.media:title: Trading Planters Is Almost as Bad as Combines
media:content.media:description: The challenges of trading planters can rival handling combines. See the process, frustrations, and lessons learned in swapping out this essential farm equipment.

item.title: Doing Everything We Were Told Not to Do!
item.description: Breaking all the rules and tackling tasks you’re warned against. Watch the chaos, surprises, and unexpected results that come from doing the opposite of instructions.

media:content.media:title: Doing Everything We Were Told Not to Do!
media:content.media:description: Breaking all the rules and tackling tasks you’re warned against. Watch the chaos, surprises, and unexpected results that come from doing the opposite of instructions.

item.title: Nothing Lasts Forever
item.description: A reflection on change, wear, or the end of an era. See the moments and events that remind us everything is temporary.

media:content.media:title: Nothing Lasts Forever
media:content.media:description: A reflection on change, wear, or the end of an era. See the moments and events that remind us everything is temporary.
